seo_title: Where Sound Baths Come From: The Honest History of Bowls, Gongs, and Nada Yoga | Sound Bath Calendar
title: Where sound baths come from
meta_description: The modern sound bath is a young practice with old roots: gong traditions of East and Southeast Asia, India's nada yoga, and Himalayan metal bowls — whose story is more modern, and richer, than the shorthand suggests. Honest credit, real context.
